title: SoroSuub Extension
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''SoroSuub Extension''' was a subsidiary of [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]], providing education programs for [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustans]].

The Sullustan [[Scout/Legends|scout]] [[Atin Attan]] studied geology from SoroSuub Extension programs during her youth.

{{Edu-stub}}

*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
